title: P10.1+P10.2: Factory Workflow Activation — Commit Gate + Session Reconstruction
intent: Stop lifecycle drift by making the factory active in the workflow. P10.1: pre-commit completion gate (FI-7) blocks commits with implementation files when any started packet lacks completion. P10.2: factory:status command reconstructs workflow state from artifacts so agents/operators can resume after context loss without human memory.
acceptance_criteria: [MIGRATION] Define acceptance criteria for this packet
